name: webconsulting/a2a-integration
description: A2A (Agent2Agent Protocol) for TYPO3 v14 — the site publishes an Agent Card, and agents discover it and delegate tasks over JSON-RPC, streaming a task lifecycle (submitted → working → input-required → completed) with artifacts. Backend console + frontend Concierge.

suggest.netresearch/nr-llm: Back the local A2A agent with a real LLM instead of the bundled deterministic one.
suggest.friendsoftypo3/content-blocks: Provides the frontend 'A2A Concierge' content element.
